latestHandover: Session 26 completed a comprehensive gap analysis. The cluster is healthy: ARC fully operational (6 AutoscalingRunnerSets, 6 listener pods), Vault auto-unsealed (Azure KV), all Supabase pods Running. Documentation is now accurate: ADR-001 reflects ARC, helmfile tracks all releases, stale secrets deleted. 2 tasks remain open (ENV-08-T1, ENV-11-T1): backup-prod.sh and rclone-config-from-vault.sh are committed to supabase-receptor/scripts/. Next agent must deploy these on ctrl-01: copy scripts to /opt/scripts/, install systemd service (rclone-config-from-vault.service → /etc/systemd/system/), create /etc/vault-token.env (VAULT_TOKEN=<root-token>), install crontab for root (0 15 * * * /opt/scripts/backup-prod.sh, 0 14 * * 0 /opt/scripts/backup-prod.sh), then run a backup dry-run to verify the pipeline.

sessionHistory.summary: Phase 1 (ADRs + pre-implementation docs) and Phase 2 (Helmfile + CI required check matrix) completed. 10 tasks marked complete. supabase-receptor audit branch created and pushed.

Phase 3 (Core Cluster Stack) completed. 21 tasks marked complete across supabase-receptor (9 files created/expanded) and common-bond (SoA 8.16 updated). New files: staging.md, incident-response.md, network-policies.yaml, serviceaccounts.yaml, falco-rules.yaml, cluster-issuer.yaml, alertmanager-config.yaml.

Phase 4 (CI Keys) completed. 7 tasks marked complete across planner-frontend and workforce-frontend. Changes: ANON_JWT export added to ci.yml Start Supabase step; SERVICE_ROLE_KEY now dynamically extracted (CICD-03); globalSetup.ts updated to use ANON_JWT for signInWithPassword; LOCAL_SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY GitHub Secret deleted from both repos (CICD-03-T3).

Phase 5 (CI Pipeline Hardening) completed. 9 tasks marked complete across 6 repos. Changes: CGEN-01/02 codegen gate now uses git diff instead of --check; CICD-04 --workdir supabase/ added; BACK-02 JWT stubs replaced; CICD-05 timeouts on all jobs; CICD-07 npm/pip cache; ENV-10 deploy-function.yml + edge-function-deployment.md. preference-frontend included for CICD-05/07. 4 new audit branches: planner-frontend, workforce-frontend, preference-frontend, match-backend, receptor-planner all pushed.

Phase 6 (Supply-Chain & Runtime Security) completed. 9 tasks marked complete across 6 repos. Changes: SEC-01 permissions blocks added to all 6 ci.yml; SEC-02 all Actions SHA-pinned; CICD-02 Supabase CLI pinned to 2.75.0; CICD-06 dependabot.yml added to all 6 repos; Renovate github-actions manager added/created in all 6 repos; SEC-04 ADR-004-docker-image-digest-pinning.md added to supabase-receptor; soa.md 8.3 and 8.8 updated.

Phase 7 (Environment Tiers, Backup, pgaudit, Key Rotation, ARCH-06) completed. 12 tasks marked complete; CICD-08 deferred (Vault supersedes GitHub Environments secret scoping). New files: environment-tiers.md, setup.conf.staging.example, setup.conf.prod.example, supabase/schemas/12_extensions/pgaudit.sql, docs/infrastructure/security/audit-logging.md, .github/workflows/key-rotation-reminder.yml. Updated: key-management.md (rewritten), disaster-recovery.md (backup + dual-provider topology), promotion-runbook.md (live URLs), kubernetes-cluster.md (Zot pull-through cache). common-bond soa.md: 8.13 dual-provider backup, 8.15 Implemented (pgaudit), 5.28 Partial. Open tasks: 34.

Phase 7.5 pre-flight interval gate created. 5 gaps and 5 enhancements from comprehensive audit review accepted. recommendations.json amended: ARCH-11 finding added, ARCH-02-T0 / ARCH-03-T0 / ISO-01-T2 tasks added, CICD-10 task descriptions fixed (removed CICD-08 dep), CICD-09 moved Phase 5→8, Phase 7.5 inserted. Slack app created and credentials stored in Vault. Open task count: 38.

Phase 7.5 gate: ADR-008 Vault OIDC bridge, setup.sh idempotency + health gate, 7-run runner trial protocol, smoke-test composite action + staging workflow, ci-required-checks v2, ISO-01 test org cleanup in all 3 frontends

Session 11 (Phase 8 Gate 8A+8B). 10 tasks completed. Gate 8A/8B close-outs confirmed already implemented: --ci/--teardown/--force in setup scripts, seed files already split, test_cleanup.sql + pg_cron live, __test_* convention in testing-guide.md. New code: BACK-01-T1 (receptor-planner pytest scoped), BACK-01-T2 (match-backend integration-tests job with Supabase boot), DOC-06-T1 (ONBOARDING.md), CICD-09-T1 (supabase-start composite action with health poll + masked key outputs). All 3 repos pushed. Open tasks: 22.

Session 12 (scoping only). 0 tasks completed. Confirmed starting state: no Hyper-V VMs exist, WSL2 toolchain not installed, external Hyper-V switch configured. User moving provisioning session to Windows host (PowerShell access needed for Hyper-V). Handover brief updated with full provisioning order and environment split (Windows host for VM creation, WSL2 for cluster toolchain and kubectl). vm-setup.md flagged as stale — rewrite during provisioning session.

Session 15 (Phase 9 partial + cluster deploy). Helm stack fully deployed on ctrl-01: vault (initialised+unsealed), traefik, calico, kube-prometheus-stack (grafana 3/3), loki-stack, falco-falcosidekick, cert-manager, cloudflared. vault.yaml TLS fixed (global.tlsDisable:true, no cert refs). Grafana datasource conflict fixed (loki-stack ConfigMap isDefault patched). ENV-05 complete: prod-deploy.yml created with backup gate + manual approval (T0+T1), soa.md 8.32 Implemented (T2). CICD-09-T2a: EVALUATION.md written — composite action recommended over reusable workflow. CICD-09-T2b: not-applicable. supabase-receptor committed (041c6d8). Workers still NotReady — Hyper-V VM-to-VM networking issue. Open tasks: 27.

Session 17 (Redundant Ingress Tier). Refactored ingress architecture: moved `cloudflared` to `traefik` namespace, scaled to 2 replicas with `podAntiAffinity` for redundancy. Fixed critical NetworkPolicy gaps: allowed TCP 7844 for Cloudflare edge connectivity and 192.168.0.0/16 for internal pod-to-pod communication. Verified connectivity to Grafana/Vault via redundant tunnels. `supabase-receptor` committed `ce3437f`. All connectivity restored after Calico-aware NetworkPolicy updates.

Session 18: Established stable API access via SSH tunnel. Resolved vault-unsealer volume mount and egress issues (NetworkPolicy fix). Pivoted auto-unseal strategy from YubiKey/PKCS#11 to Azure Key Vault for robustness. Authored vault-configuration.md documenting the new architecture.

Session 19: Infrastructure Robustness & CI/CD Architecture. Refreshed as-built documentation (kubernetes-cluster.md, vm-setup.md) for 3-node topology. Authored cicd-architecture.md merging Option A detail with K3s-native lifecycle. Deferred Falco implementation (SEC-07) and uninstalled release. Standardized audit metadata paths for Linux environment.

Session 20: Infrastructure Stabilization & Multi-Repo Runners. Resolved systemic DNS issues via Calico IP pool realignment. Deployed 6 CI runners across 6 repositories. Activated self-hosted runner in supabase-receptor. Marked ARCH-01-T2, ARCH-01-T3, ARCH-03-T2, ENV-05-T3, and ARCH-05-T2 as complete.

Session 21: Infrastructure Gap Analysis & Audit Close-out. Full cluster inspection (60+ pods, 15 namespaces, 8 Helm releases). 17 infrastructure gaps identified and resolved (staging NetworkPolicies, Traefik dedup, Zot registry, TLS removal, CI image SHA pinning, VM registries.yaml). 6 audit tasks closed, 1 deferred (SEC-03 branch protection to May 2026). SoA v1.1 updated for physical controls 7.1-7.5/7.8 and network segregation 8.22. ci.yml refactored to use supabase-start composite action. Validation script confirmed ci-required-checks.md matrix is stale.

Session 22: CI Matrix Refresh. Installed gh 2.88.1 + jq on WSL2; gh auth as dm-ra-01. Cloned all 5 missing repos. Audited all 6 ci.yml files and verified actual GitHub check display names against live main-branch runs. ci-required-checks.md refreshed to v3 (20 checks, 6 repos). validate-branch-protection.sh MATRIX updated to display names; fixed ((N++)) set -e bug. Validation: 20/20 PASSED exit 0. Pushed b6b6ca6 to supabase-receptor audit branch. SEC-03-T2 CI-side readiness confirmed for 2026-05-09.

Session 23: Vault Runner Migration + Documentation Modernisation. Rotated exposed GitHub PAT. Migrated all 6 CI runner Deployments from ACCESS_TOKEN (PAT) to GitHub App auth (App ID 3095294, dm-ra-01). Private key stored in Vault KV (secret/ci/github-app). k8s Secret github-app-credentials created in-cluster without key touching workstation. All 6 runners confirmed online. Updated supabase-receptor docs: ADR-001 (runner arch), ADR-003 (implemented vs planned Vault features), vault-configuration.md (actual state), cicd-architecture.md (removed stale Docker Compose install steps), ci-troubleshooting.md (Failure Mode 5 added), arc-migration-handover.md created for next agent. Committed and pushed to audit/260312-cicd-environments.

Session 24: ARC Migration (code/config complete; cluster steps pending sudo). Added CICD-11 finding to recommendations.json. Updated all 6 repos ci.yml runs-on labels from [self-hosted, k3s] to repo-specific ARC runner set labels (e.g. arc-runner-supabase-receptor). Added arc-controller.yaml, arc-runner-sets.yaml, and DEPLOY.md runbook to supabase-receptor/k3s/ci-runner/. CICD-11-T3 (ci.yml label updates) marked complete. CICD-11-T1 (install ARC controller), CICD-11-T2 (AutoscalingRunnerSets), CICD-11-T4 (decommission myoung34) remain open — blocked on passwordless sudo on ctrl-01. ENV-08-T1 and ENV-11-T1 still blocked (same sudo requirement).

Session 24 (continued): ARC cluster deployment complete. ARC controller installed (arc-systems), 6 AutoscalingRunnerSets installed (arc-runners), all 6 listener pods Running. All 6 myoung34 Deployments deleted. All old runner-token Secrets (planner-frontend-token etc.) deleted. /tmp/get_install_id.py cleaned from ctrl-01. Security review: no credentials in committed files. CICD-11 fully complete. Open tasks: 2 (ENV-08-T1, ENV-11-T1 — blocked on sudo apt install postgresql-client rclone on ctrl-01, now unblocked with passwordless sudo).

Session 25 (2026-03-15): ARC fully operational and verified. Fixed ARC dispatch routing (bare runs-on label — self-hosted array was routing to traditional pool). Fixed pip ENOSPC from 6 concurrent heavy installs (TMPDIR redirect). Engine bug fixed in receptor-planner: engine.py was returning SUCCESS+data:[] when allow_partial_filling=True and all capacity=0 — now returns INFEASIBLE. CI green on receptor-planner audit branch (950c737). Security review: no credentials in git, /tmp script cleaned from ctrl-01.

Session 26: Comprehensive Gap Analysis & Documentation Remediation. Full cross-check: live cluster vs. committed manifests vs. docs vs. audit register. 9 gaps identified and resolved: (1) ADR-001 updated to document ARC as current architecture (myoung34 moved to 'Previous Approach' section). (2) vault-configuration.md CI Secret Flow updated to show ARC path. (3) arc-migration-handover.md replaced with completion notice. (4) helmfile.yaml vault version corrected 0.28.1→0.32.0; ARC controller and 6 runner sets added as helmfile releases for full k8s lifecycle management. (5) Stale secrets github-runner-pat and github-app-credentials deleted from ci-runner namespace (ci-runner namespace now empty). (6) ARC supabase-receptor runner set confirmed healthy (runner-scale-set-id=1, blank CURRENT RUNNERS is cosmetic display issue, not a fault). (7) 10 findings with all-complete tasks closed: CICD-01, ARCH-01, ARCH-02, ARCH-03, PROC-01, DOC-06, CICD-09, CICD-10, ARCH-11, CICD-11. (8) scripts/backup-prod.sh written (pg_dumpall → gzip → dual-stream R2 + B2 via tee, Slack alerts, 30-day retention). (9) scripts/rclone-config-from-vault.sh + .service written (systemd oneshot populates rclone.conf from Vault KV at VM boot). ENV-08-T1 and ENV-11-T1 remain open — scripts committed, operational deploy + crontab install on ctrl-01 is a manual step requiring live cluster access. Additionally closed 8 more findings with all-complete tasks: ENV-03, ENV-04, ISO-01, ISO-02, DOC-01, BACK-01, ARCH-05, ISO-03. Final state: 55 complete, 2 accepted, 1 deferred, 2 open (ENV-08, ENV-11).

sessionGates: Gate 8A: ARCH-02-T1 + ENV-03 — setup.sh CI-native mode + RESET --force flag (supabase-receptor only)
Gate 8B: ISO-01-T1 + ISO-01-T2 + ISO-02-T1 + ENV-04-T1 — test isolation + seed namespacing (supabase-receptor + 3 frontends)
Gate 8C: ARCH-03-T0 verified → ARCH-01-T1 + ARCH-03-T1 + CICD-01-T1 + CICD-09-T1 — runner migration + composite action (all 6 repos, CICD-09 prerequisite in place)
